title: DraNimation Lib [BTW Addon]
description: A library used for the Dynamic Visuals Series' addons
body:
# DraNimation Lib (BTW:CE Addon)
This addon is a library part of the [Dynamic Visuals Series](https://modrinth.com/collection/Lu0zyquD) needed by all of its addons.

## Dependencies

- https://modrinth.com/mod/btwce

## Found a bug or have suggestions ?
https://github.com/BTW-Community/Dynamic-Visuals-Series/issues

## Download
https://modrinth.com/mod/dranimation-lib/versions
